# bankruptcytaxes.org

> Guide to tax debts in bankruptcy -- which taxes can be discharged.

bankruptcytaxes.org is a free, open-source educational resource about tax obligations in bankruptcy. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://bankruptcytaxes.org/: Guide to tax debts in bankruptcy -- the 3-year, 2-year, and 240-day rules

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
